meaning: (=scrummage) 扭打,混乱,<美>[橄]两队并列争球
examples: There was a real scrum when the bus arrived.
The key aspect of a daily scrum (or standup or team meeting) is to focus on what the team is working on now.
A daily scrum meeting was held.
Their only try came six minutes from the end when replacement scrum-half Colin Ellis crossed.
The scrum-half went over in the corner, finishing off Deiniol Jones' powerful break down the wing.
